name: age
description: Age of the individual in years

name: gender
description: Biological sex (0 = Female, 1 = Male)

name: education_years
description: Total years of formal education completed

name: income_level
description: Socioeconomic status on an ordinal scale (1 = lowest, 5 = highest)

name: smoker
description: Indicates whether the individual has a history of smoking (0 = No, 1 = Yes)

name: smoking_years
description: Total number of years the individual has smoked

name: cigarettes_per_day
description: Average number of cigarettes smoked per day

name: pack_years
description: Cumulative smoking exposure combining duration and intensity

name: passive_smoking
description: Exposure to secondhand smoke (0 = No, 1 = Yes)

name: air_pollution_index
description: Air quality index representing long-term pollution exposure

name: occupational_exposure
description: Exposure to hazardous substances at work (0 = No, 1 = Yes)

name: radon_exposure
description: History of radon exposure (0 = No, 1 = Yes)

name: family_history_cancer
description: Family history of cancer (0 = No, 1 = Yes)

name: copd
description: Diagnosis of chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (0 = No, 1 = Yes)

name: asthma
description: History of asthma (0 = No, 1 = Yes)

name: previous_tb
description: History of tuberculosis infection (0 = No, 1 = Yes)

name: chronic_cough
description: Presence of long-term cough symptoms (0 = No, 1 = Yes)

name: chest_pain
description: Reports of chest pain (0 = No, 1 = Yes)

name: shortness_of_breath
description: Presence of breathing difficulty (0 = No, 1 = Yes)

name: fatigue
description: Persistent fatigue symptoms (0 = No, 1 = Yes)

name: bmi
description: Body mass index category value

name: oxygen_saturation
description: Blood oxygen saturation level (%)

name: fev1_x10
description: Lung function measure derived from forced expiratory volume

name: crp_level
description: C-reactive protein level indicating inflammation

name: xray_abnormal
description: Abnormal findings in chest imaging (0 = No, 1 = Yes)

name: exercise_hours_per_week
description: Average weekly physical activity duration

name: diet_quality
description: Overall dietary quality score (1 = poor, 5 = excellent)

name: alcohol_units_per_week
description: Average alcohol consumption per week

name: healthcare_access
description: Access to healthcare services (1 = poor, 5 = excellent)

name: lung_cancer_risk
description: Target variable indicating elevated lung cancer risk (0 = No, 1 = Yes)
